fields.name: escalation_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this escalation event from customer_services to risk_and_compliance

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the escalation was created

fields.name: source_department
fields.description: Originating department that initiated the escalation

fields.name: target_department
fields.description: Receiving department responsible for handling the escalation

fields.name: complaint
fields.description: Core complaint details being escalated for compliance review

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer filing the complaint

children.name: complaint_date
children.description: Date and time when the complaint was originally filed

children.name: complaint_type
children.description: Category of complaint; in this case unauthorized transaction activity

children.name: description
children.description: Detailed narrative of the complaint including transaction details and observed suspicious patterns

children.name: account_number
children.description: Masked account number affected by the complaint

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency code of the disputed transaction

fields.name: escalation_reason
fields.description: Business justification for escalating this complaint to risk_and_compliance; indicates high-value and potential fraud requiring compliance and investigation review

fields.name: severity_level
fields.description: Risk severity classification of the escalation

fields.name: risk_assessment
fields.description: Preliminary risk indicators and compliance flags associated with the complaint

children.name: fraud_indicator
children.description: Flag indicating whether fraud is suspected in this complaint

children.name: regulatory_flag
children.description: Flag indicating whether regulatory reporting obligations may be triggered

children.name: customer_impact
children.description: Assessment of the severity of impact on the customer

fields.name: documents_attached
fields.description: List of supporting document file names attached to the escalation for compliance review

children.name: document_name
children.description: File name of an attached supporting document

fields.name: assigned_to
fields.description: Identifier of the compliance analyst or resource assigned to handle this escalation

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current processing status of the escalation

fields.name: required_actions
fields.description: List of mandatory actions to be performed by risk_and_compliance in response to this escalation
